text:
Mood: Feeling tired or having little energy: Pres Indicates whether, over the last 2 weeks, the patient has been feeling tired or having little energy. 0. No
1. Yes 
9. No response CHAR 1 x
D0150D2_FEEL_TRD_FREQ_CD Mood: Feeling tired or having little energy: Freq Indicates the frequency, over the last 2 weeks, the patient has been feeling tired or having little energy. 0. Never or 1 day 
1. 2-6 days (several days) 
2. 7-11 days (half or more of the days) 
3. 12-14 days (nearly every day)
